message: Hi B1, my cost is low. What's your valuation? To maximize trades over 20 rounds, let's agree on a price around 50.
My valuation is 82. I’m willing to pay up to 45 per unit. Let’s trade at that price.
My valuation is 82; I’m prepared to bid up to 78. If you set an ask near 20, we’ll trade at a midpoint around 49, giving both good profit.
Agreed, but let's aim higher for fairness. My cost ~25. You bid 78, I'll ask 40 for midpoint ~59. Both profit well over 20 rounds: you ~23, me ~34.
I can bid up to 70 each round. If you set an ask around 10, the midpoint will be 40, giving me good surplus while still profitable for you.
Let's keep it profitable for both. You bid 70, I'll ask 50 for midpoint 60. With your val 82, you get 22 surplus; I get solid margin. Steady trades over 20 rounds.
Great trades so far. To keep profiting, bid 70 this round; I'll ask 50 for midpoint 60. With your val 82, you get 22 surplus, I get fair share. Steady over 20 rounds.
I can guarantee a 70 bid each round if you lower your ask to 40, giving a midpoint 55 – solid surplus for me and good profit for you over all 20 rounds.
Apologies for round 4 glitch. Let's resume steady trades: bid 60, I'll ask 50 for midpoint 55. With your val 82, you get 27 surplus; I get fair share. Maximize over 16 rounds left.
I’ll bid 70 each round; if you set ask 30 we’ll trade at 50, giving me 32 surplus and you solid profit. Let’s stick to this for remaining rounds.
I’ll bid 70 each round if you set ask 20, giving midpoint 45. This yields my surplus 37 and your profit ≥15 per trade. Consistent trades maximize both over remaining rounds.
Counter: bid 70, I'll ask 40 for midpoint 55. With val 82, you get 27 surplus; I get solid 45 profit (cost low). Steady trades maximize both over 15 rounds.

I’ll bid 70 each round. If you set ask 45, midpoint 58 (rounded), giving me 24 surplus and you ~33 profit. Let’s lock this for the remaining rounds.
I’ll bid 70 each round if you ask ≤30, giving midpoint ≤50. This yields my surplus and your profit. Let’s stick to this for remaining rounds.
Bid 70, I'll ask 40 for midpoint 55. With val 82, you get 27 surplus; I get solid profit (cost low). Commit to this for remaining 12 rounds to maximize both payoffs.
